req.title: Announcement rollout — variant 5
req.statement: A system-admin shall publish an org-wide announcement to employees in chosen departments; publishing without any department selection shall be rejected. Additionally, the action requires two-factor authentication confirmation.

doc.reasoning: The requirement has three key decision axes: (1) department selection present vs absent, (2) 2FA confirmation provided vs missing, and (3) the boundary of exactly one department selected. EP covers the valid full-flow and the no-department rejection. BVA covers the minimal single-department boundary. STC covers the 2FA state transition from unconfirmed to confirmed. DT covers the combination of missing departments AND missing 2FA. NEG covers submitting with 2FA skipped but departments present.

tests.name: test_publish_announcement_with_valid_departments_and_2fa
preconditions: At least two departments exist in the organisation
2FA is enabled for the admin account
No duplicate announcement with same title exists
actions: Navigate to /org-announcements/new
Fill in announcement title and body
Select two or more departments from the department picker
Submit the form
Complete 2FA confirmation with a valid TOTP code
expected: HTTP 201 or redirect to announcement detail page
Announcement record is persisted in the database
All employees in selected departments receive a notification
No error banner is shown on the UI
trace: R-WEB-091: positive path — departments selected, 2FA confirmed
tests.executable:
def test_publish_announcement_with_valid_departments_and_2fa(admin_page, api_client, totp_code):
    page = admin_page
    page.goto("/org-announcements/new")
    page.fill("[data-testid='announcement-title']", "All-hands Q3 Update")
    page.fill("[data-testid='announcement-body']", "Please join us for the Q3 all-hands.")
    <select_departments>(page, ["Engineering", "Marketing"])
    page.click("[data-testid='submit-announcement']")
    page.fill("[data-testid='2fa-code-input']", totp_code)
    page.click("[data-testid='2fa-confirm']")
    assert page.url.endswith("/org-announcements") or "/org-announcements/" in page.url
    assert page.locator("[data-testid='error-banner']").count() == 0
    ann = api_client.get("/api/org-announcements", params={"title": "All-hands Q3 Update"}).json()
    assert ann["data"][0]["status"] == "published"
    notified = api_client.get(f"/api/org-announcements/{ann['data'][0]['id']}/notifications").json()
    assert notified["total"] > 0

tests.name: test_publish_announcement_without_departments_returns_422
preconditions: 2FA is enabled for the admin account
actions: Navigate to /org-announcements/new
Fill in announcement title and body
Leave department selection empty
Submit the form
expected: Form submission is rejected with HTTP 422 or inline validation error
An error message indicating department selection is required is displayed
No announcement record is created
No notifications are dispatched
trace: R-WEB-091: error pathway — no departments selected yields 422
tests.executable:
def test_publish_announcement_without_departments_returns_422(admin_page, api_client):
    page = admin_page
    page.goto("/org-announcements/new")
    page.fill("[data-testid='announcement-title']", "No-Dept Announcement")
    page.fill("[data-testid='announcement-body']", "This should fail.")
    page.click("[data-testid='submit-announcement']")
    error_locator = page.locator("[data-testid='dept-error-msg']")
    assert error_locator.is_visible()
    assert "department" in error_locator.inner_text().lower()
    response = api_client.get("/api/org-announcements", params={"title": "No-Dept Announcement"}).json()
    assert response["data"] == []
    assert page.url.endswith("/org-announcements/new")

tests.name: test_publish_announcement_with_exactly_one_department
preconditions: At least one department exists in the organisation
2FA is enabled for the admin account
actions: Navigate to /org-announcements/new
Fill in announcement title and body
Select exactly one department from the department picker
Submit the form
Complete 2FA confirmation with a valid TOTP code
expected: Form accepts single-department selection without validation error
HTTP 201 or redirect to announcement detail page
Announcement record is persisted targeting only that one department
Employees in the selected department are notified; others are not
trace: R-WEB-091: boundary — minimum valid department count is 1
tests.executable:
def test_publish_announcement_with_exactly_one_department(admin_page, api_client, totp_code):
    page = admin_page
    page.goto("/org-announcements/new")
    page.fill("[data-testid='announcement-title']", "Single-Dept Boundary Test")
    page.fill("[data-testid='announcement-body']", "Boundary test body.")
    <select_departments>(page, ["Engineering"])
    selected_count = page.locator("[data-testid='selected-dept-tag']").count()
    assert selected_count == 1
    page.click("[data-testid='submit-announcement']")
    page.fill("[data-testid='2fa-code-input']", totp_code)
    page.click("[data-testid='2fa-confirm']")
    assert page.locator("[data-testid='error-banner']").count() == 0
    ann = api_client.get("/api/org-announcements", params={"title": "Single-Dept Boundary Test"}).json()
    assert ann["data"][0]["status"] == "published"
    dept_targets = ann["data"][0]["target_departments"]
    assert len(dept_targets) == 1
    assert dept_targets[0]["name"] == "Engineering"

tests.name: test_publish_announcement_2fa_state_transition_unconfirmed_to_confirmed
preconditions: 2FA is enabled for the admin account
Admin is on the 2FA challenge step (departments already selected and form submitted)
actions: Navigate to /org-announcements/new
Fill title, body, select one department, submit form
Observe system enters PENDING_2FA state
Enter correct TOTP code in 2FA modal
Confirm 2FA to transition to CONFIRMED state
expected: Before 2FA: announcement is in PENDING state, not yet published
After 2FA confirmation: announcement transitions to PUBLISHED state
2FA modal is dismissed after successful confirmation
Redirect occurs to announcement listing or detail page
trace: R-WEB-091: 2FA state transition — PENDING_2FA -> CONFIRMED -> PUBLISHED
tests.executable:
def test_publish_announcement_2fa_state_transition(admin_page, api_client, totp_code):
    page = admin_page
    page.goto("/org-announcements/new")
    page.fill("[data-testid='announcement-title']", "2FA Transition Test")
    page.fill("[data-testid='announcement-body']", "Testing 2FA state machine.")
    <select_departments>(page, ["Finance"])
    page.click("[data-testid='submit-announcement']")
    assert page.locator("[data-testid='2fa-modal']").is_visible()
    pending = api_client.get("/api/org-announcements", params={"title": "2FA Transition Test"}).json()
    if pending["data"]:
        assert pending["data"][0]["status"] == "pending"
    page.fill("[data-testid='2fa-code-input']", totp_code)
    page.click("[data-testid='2fa-confirm']")
    assert page.locator("[data-testid='2fa-modal']").count() == 0
    published = api_client.get("/api/org-announcements", params={"title": "2FA Transition Test"}).json()
    assert published["data"][0]["status"] == "published"

tests.name: test_publish_announcement_no_dept_and_no_2fa_both_rejected
preconditions: 2FA is enabled for the admin account
actions: Navigate to /org-announcements/new
Fill in announcement title and body
Leave department selection empty
Attempt to submit without selecting departments
Observe rejection before 2FA prompt is ever shown
expected: Form is rejected at department validation before 2FA is ever requested
Inline error for missing department is shown
2FA modal is never displayed
No announcement record is created
trace: R-WEB-091: decision table — missing departments AND absent 2FA; dept error takes precedence
tests.executable:
def test_publish_announcement_no_dept_and_no_2fa_both_rejected(admin_page, api_client):
    page = admin_page
    page.goto("/org-announcements/new")
    page.fill("[data-testid='announcement-title']", "DT Combo Fail Test")
    page.fill("[data-testid='announcement-body']", "Decision table negative combo.")
    page.click("[data-testid='submit-announcement']")
    dept_error = page.locator("[data-testid='dept-error-msg']")
    assert dept_error.is_visible()
    assert page.locator("[data-testid='2fa-modal']").count() == 0
    assert page.url.endswith("/org-announcements/new")
    result = api_client.get("/api/org-announcements", params={"title": "DT Combo Fail Test"}).json()
    assert result["data"] == []
